name: Abbigail & Brian
text: Gabriela and Conor are the best photographers. They are cool and calm in the most hectic of days. They go ahead with your ideas but also make really helpful suggestions. I had no clue what I wanted so was grateful for the ideas. Would recommend to anyone — truly lovely people.

name: Shenia & Brian
text: We had an amazing experience with our photographer Gabriela Duffy — she was professional, friendly, and made the whole shoot feel relaxed and fun. The photos turned out absolutely beautiful. Communication was easy from start to finish, and the final images exceeded our expectations.

name: Niamh & Gary
text: Gabriela went above and beyond for us on our wedding day. Everyone remarked how comfortable they felt with her taking photographs. She put everyone at ease and took incredible shots that captured the day beautifully. She took the time to learn the family's names — I would highly recommend Duffymog Studios, you won't be disappointed!

name: Jason & Mateusz
text: Gabriela and Conor were everything we could have hoped for. It honestly felt like they were two of our friends there to celebrate with us. The photos were beyond anything we could have hoped for and we received countless compliments from guests — about the photos and about what really lovely people they are.
